content: gemini-embedding-001 free tier rate limits (confirmed by Google staff on AI Developers Forum): TPM: 30,000, RPM: 100, RPD: 1,000. Source: https://discuss.ai.google.dev/t/gemini-embedding-free-tier-documentation/112553. Limits applied per Google Cloud project, reset at midnight Pacific. The 1000 RPD limit is the binding constraint for multi-session usage.
